subcodes.first_line: O Khudadad! The gift of God is all nobility, wisdom, vision and hearing. Yet what benefit [is there that] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداداد داد خدا همه بزرگواری و داناای و بیناای و شنواایست ولی چه فائده که
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
